introSection: Jungle Rally is a kiddie roller coaster located at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Jungle Rally was one of two attractions announced by the park in February 2018. It opened two months later on April 27.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The theming was supplied by Leisure Expert Group.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a set of offroad cars.

fullText:
Jungle Rally is a kiddie roller coaster located at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark.

Jungle Rally was one of two attractions announced by the park in February 2018. It opened two months later on April 27.

The theming was supplied by Leisure Expert Group.

White track and black supports

The train is designed to resemble a set of offroad cars.
